description: Framework for building context-aware LLM applications, AI agents, and RAG pipelines.
content: LangChain helps developers build AI-powered applications using chains, memory, agents, tools, and vector databases for advanced LLM workflows.
embed_text: LangChain is an AI tool. Category: LLM Framework. Framework for building context-aware LLM applications, AI agents, and RAG pipelines. Key features include agents, tool calling, memory, RAG pipelines. Common use cases are chatbots, AI agents, document QA. Pricing model: open-source.

description: Data framework for connecting custom data sources with large language models.
content: LlamaIndex enables developers to build RAG systems and AI agents by indexing structured and unstructured data sources for LLM retrieval.
embed_text: LlamaIndex is an AI tool. Category: LLM Framework. Data framework for connecting custom data sources with large language models. Key features include data connectors, vector indexing, retrieval pipelines. Common use cases are enterprise search, document QA, knowledge assistants. Pricing model: open-source.

description: Framework for building production-ready NLP and LLM applications.

embed_text: Haystack is an AI tool. Category: LLM Framework. Framework for building production-ready NLP and LLM applications. Key features include pipelines, retrievers, agent support. Common use cases are semantic search, RAG systems, question answering. Pricing model: open-source.

description: Framework for algorithmically optimizing prompts and LLM pipelines.

Key features include prompt optimization, few-shot tuning, LLM programming. Common use cases are prompt engineering, LLM optimization, AI research. Pricing model: open-source.

description: Microsoft's open-source SDK for integrating AI models into applications with plugins and planners.

description: Library for building stateful, multi-actor LLM applications as graphs.
